creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Ali Abdallah from comment #45)

I ditched the patch I was using and applied your latest patch to 14.1 and 14.2.
After brief testing, it seems to be working (better than the former), but, as this is a laptop and I'm not using USB LAN frequently, time will tell.
I'll get back if/when I encounter further problems.
Thanks a lot.
